response.justification: Despite a strong full-stack and open-source background, the candidate has minimal demonstrable C++ experience beyond a brief role at National Instruments 10 years ago, and lacks current hands-on work with core requirements like STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial IoT protocols — all critical for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with modern web and distributed systems
Strong track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Proven ability to deliver complex systems across diverse domains (GIS, IoT, automation)
concerns: No recent C++ or STL work; primary language focus is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang
Lacks documented experience with message brokers, MQTT, or industrial cybersecurity standards
No evidence of on-premises industrial automation or embedded systems development in recent roles
